title: Interest Topics (POI)
description: Manage interest extraction settings and review detected topics from conversations.

settings.llmModelHint: When unset, uses the flowy-cloud model selected in the active conversation; otherwise falls back to the first enabled cloud model.
settings.autoExtractHint: Extract interest topics automatically during conversations when thresholds are met — no manual clear or delete required.
settings.autoExtractIdleSecsHint: Also extract after this many seconds without new messages (e.g. 300 = 5 minutes).

topics.title: Topics
topics.label: Label
topics.clearConfirmContent: This permanently removes all stored interest topics.
